project.description: Job2 - Test: database connectivity and application smoke test

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -eux
bash /var/jenkins_home/ci-scripts/jenkins-checkout.sh
if [[ -f .env ]]; then set -a; source .env; set +a; fi
COMPOSE_PROJECT="${COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME:-equalvoice}" COMPOSE="-f docker-compose.yml" DB_ROOT="${DB_ROOT_PASSWORD:-root_password_123}" DB_USER="${DB_USER:-equalvoice_user}" DB_PASS="${DB_PASS:-user_password_456}" DB_NAME="${DB_NAME:-equalvoice_db}"
echo "======================================" echo "Job2 - EqualVoice Test" echo "======================================"
echo "Step 1: Start database..." docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}" ${COMPOSE} up -d mysql
MYSQL_ID="" for i in $(seq 1 60); do MYSQL_ID="$(docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}" ${COMPOSE} ps -q mysql 2>/dev/null | head -1)" if [[ -n "${MYSQL_ID}" ]] && docker exec "${MYSQL_ID}" mysqladmin ping \ -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 --protocol=tcp \ -u root --password="${DB_ROOT}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Database ready (${MYSQL_ID})" break fi echo "Waiting for DB ($i/60)..." sleep 2 done
if [[ -z "${MYSQL_ID}" ]]; then echo "ERROR: mysql service not found" docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}" ${COMPOSE} ps exit 1 fi
NETWORK="$(docker inspect "${MYSQL_ID}" --format '{{range $n, $v := .NetworkSettings.Networks}}{{$n}}{{end}}' | head -1)" echo "Docker network: ${NETWORK}"
echo "Step 2: DB connectivity test (hostname: mysql)..." docker run --rm \ --network "${NETWORK}" \ mysql:8.0 \ mysql -h mysql -u"${DB_USER}" -p"${DB_PASS}" "${DB_NAME}" -e "SELECT 1 AS db_ok"
echo "MySQL version:" docker exec "${MYSQL_ID}" mysql -uroot -p"${DB_ROOT}" -e "SELECT VERSION();"
echo "Step 3: CI smoke (web container)..." docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}_ci" ${COMPOSE} -f docker-compose.ci.yml up -d web
WEB_ID="" success=0 for i in $(seq 1 60); do WEB_ID="$(docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}_ci" ${COMPOSE} -f docker-compose.ci.yml ps -q web 2>/dev/null | head -1)" if [[ -n "${WEB_ID}" ]] && docker exec "${WEB_ID}" curl -fsS -o /dev/null http://localhost/index.php 2>/dev/null; then echo "Web smoke OK (attempt $i)" success=1 break fi sleep 2 done
docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}_ci" ${COMPOSE} -f docker-compose.ci.yml down -v || true
if [[ "$success" -ne 1 ]]; then echo "Web smoke test failed" [[ -n "${WEB_ID}" ]] && docker logs --tail=50 "${WEB_ID}" || true exit 1 fi
echo "All tests passed"
